summary: Comprehensive testing completed for Dams Car Rental app. All 21 backend API tests passed. All frontend flows tested and working correctly including login, home, car detail, booking, profile, and admin panel. No critical issues found.

issues: Shadow* style props deprecated warnings (React Native Web compatibility - not critical, app functions correctly)

seed_data_creation: No additional seed data created. App uses existing seeded data: 6 cars, 1 admin user (admin@damscarrental.com)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features tested and working. Backend: Auth (JWT + Google OAuth), Cars (public + admin CRUD), Bookings, Admin stats. Frontend: Login, Home with search/filters, Car detail, Booking flow (cash payment tested), Bookings tab, Profile with admin badge, Admin panel with stats and CRUD. Registration page verified. No bugs found.

auth.test_register_success: PASSED - User registration creates account with token
auth.test_login_success: PASSED - Admin login returns token and role

cars.test_get_all_cars_admin: PASSED - Admin can access all cars
cars.test_create_car_admin: PASSED - Admin can create car, verified with GET
cars.test_update_car_admin: PASSED - Admin can update car, verified with GET
cars.test_delete_car_admin: PASSED - Admin can delete car, verified with GET 404

bookings.test_create_booking_authenticated: PASSED - Authenticated user can create booking, verified with GET
bookings.test_get_bookings_authenticated: PASSED - User can retrieve their bookings

admin.test_get_admin_stats: PASSED - Admin can access stats (6 cars, 1 booking, 6 users, 1 active)

frontend_tests.login_flow: PASSED - Login page loads, credentials fill correctly, login successful, navigates to home
frontend_tests.home_screen: PASSED - Shows 6 car cards with images, search input works, category filters work (All, SUV, etc.)
frontend_tests.car_detail: PASSED - Shows car name, year, brand, specs (seats, transmission, fuel), description, locations with map links, Book Now button
frontend_tests.booking_flow: PASSED - Booking page shows car summary, rental period, locations with map link, payment method selection (cash/stripe), order summary with total, confirm booking button works, shows success page
frontend_tests.bookings_tab: PASSED - Accessible, shows 'No bookings yet' for new user, Browse Cars button present
frontend_tests.profile_tab: PASSED - Shows user name (Admin), email (admin@damscarrental.com), admin badge with shield icon, My Bookings link, Admin Panel link, Logout button
frontend_tests.admin_panel: PASSED - Shows stats (6 cars, 1 booking, 6 users, 1 active), car list with edit/delete buttons, Add car button opens modal with all fields (name, brand, model, year, category pills, price, seats, image URL, description)
frontend_tests.registration_page: PASSED - All form fields present with testIDs (name, email, password), Create Account button, Sign In link
